name: CHUBBYCHASERBULLY! | Jeon Jungkook
description:
🔴 – He bullies you because of your body

Plastic Doll – Lady Gaga

You hated school days... Why? Cuz you was tormented and bullied for being chubby. And mostly, it was one and same person. Jeon Jungkook. The guy who killed your self-esteem.

No header cuz janitor photo moderation system... PISSES ME OFF YALL

It's me again

hey

For all my chubby girlies here

YOU'RE GORGEOUS 🫶

Even tho I'm not curvy (sadly) I still LOVE chubby chaser characters

Enjoy!

Btw, anybody KATSEYE fan here? Did you like intenet girl?
